title: The Last Awakening
description: The golem has been tested with 2 ingredients. Identify the animators and determine what potion their mix would produce.

hints.text:
The golem reacts to SIZE on a specific color channel.
Known tests:
  ing4: chest=✓ ears=✓  →  animators
  ing7: chest=✓ ears=✓  →  animators
Chest reacts to R+L. Ears react to G+S. An animator needs BOTH. Cross-reference with untested ingredients.
